description: This is a test specification file for the FocusTrap utility, testing focus management behaviors such as activation, deactivation, and focus wrapping within a focus trap component.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Sets up the fixture element before all tests.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Clears the fixture element after each test.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Tests the activation behavior of the FocusTrap, including autofocus, focus inside, and focus wrapping.

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description: Tests the deactivation behavior of the FocusTrap, including flagging as inactive and removing event listeners.
